$doc: OpenCode delivery map. The guard is a plugin (tool.execute.before), not an exit-2 hook. Skills go to ~/.agents/skills (OpenCode reads it natively). opencode.json is merged — including an additive `instructions` entry pointing at {{CLONE_ROOT}}/global/AGENTS.md (leos-merge expands the token to the clone path), so leos's global instructions load ALONGSIDE the user's own ~/.config/opencode/AGENTS.md instead of clobbering it. NOTE: OpenCode has no documented Stop-event hook, so the council Stop-nudge is NOT wired here — the council still runs via the skill + global AGENTS.md mandate.

links.note: OpenCode loads local plugins from plugins/; the plugin self-locates the shared guard
BIN for the council skill on OpenCode host

retiredLinks.note: REMOVED: the whole-file symlink clobbered the user's global instructions — replaced by an additive `instructions[]` entry ({{CLONE_ROOT}}/global/AGENTS.md) in the merged opencode.json. leos-doctor flags a leftover clone-symlink here.

machineLocal.note: native=opencode --agent plan (host model) + external roster minus this host's model
